title: Contextual help and AI mini-chat
goal: Add reusable tooltips, help topics and floating AI mini-chat tied to setting_id context.
acceptance: Every significant descriptor can expose tooltip text and help_topic_id.
Help icon opens a floating HTMX mini-chat with the current setting_id.
Mini-chat initial response displays help for the selected setting without user restating context.
Questions include structured descriptor context with secret and sensitive values masked.
Write suggestions from chat are proposals only and cannot bypass normal confirmation/service-layer apply.
Tests prove raw secret values and disallowed sensitive fields are not sent to help context.
